name: Beef Casserole with Edam
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Black olives, pitted and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook onion in butter over moderate heat until golden.
2. Add steak, tomatoes, and bell peppers. Cook, stirring, until veggies are softened.
3. Add egg, raisins, olives, gherkins, and mushrooms; stir for 1 minute.
4. Add brandy, ignite gently by swirling the skillet.
5. Stir in flour and cook for 2 minutes.
6. Stir in broth, chili paste, chili sauce, ketchup, Tabasco, salt, and pepper to taste. Simmer, stirring occasionally, until thickened for 5 minutes.
7. Arrange Edam slices on the sides of a 2-quart shallow casserole.
8. Pour beef mixture into the casserole and cover with remaining Edam.
9. Add water to reach 1-inch up the sides; cover pan with foil.
10. Bake in preheated oven at 325°F for 15 minutes.
11. Serve with sauteed bananas.
